label: ILC1_NK
resolved_names: innate lymphoid cell type 1/natural killer cell
evidence: In the figures and supplementary tables (e.g., Extended Data Fig. 8d and Supplementary Table 7) of the referenced atlas paper (10.1038/s41586-024-08002-x), the label 'ILC1_NK' maps to 'ILC1/NK cell' or 'innate lymphoid cell type 1/natural killer cell.' This nomenclature is consistent across the main immune transcriptional cluster annotation schematic and fine cell type tables, specifically identifying this population in the skin atlas context.
